name: git-sweep-pro
description: Safely identify and prune local branches that are gone on the remote.

commands.title: Git Sweep Pro: Post Pull Request
Git Sweep Pro: Sync With Upstream
Git Sweep Pro: Sync With Upstream (Resume)

enumDescriptions: Only report the branches that would be deleted.
Delete branches with git branch -d (refuses unmerged branches).
Delete branches with git branch -D (force, even if unmerged).
gitSweepPro.defaultMode.description: Default execution mode presented first in the Run command's mode picker.

gitSweepPro.protectedBranches.markdownDescription: Glob patterns for branches that must never be deleted (e.g. `main`, `develop`, `release/*`). `*` matches any characters and `?` matches a single character.

gitSweepPro.autoFetchPrune.description: Run 'git fetch -p' before detecting stale branches. Disable to operate on the local ref state only.

gitSweepPro.confirmBeforeDelete.description: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting the selected branches.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run compile && vscode-test --label e2e --label e2e-mr
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: npm run build && npm run compile && vscode-test --label e2e --label e2e-mr --coverage --coverage-output=coverage/e2e --coverage-reporter=text-summary --coverage-reporter=json-summary --coverage-reporter=lcov
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:coverage && npm run coverage:check
